steps.title: Convert percentages to decimal equations
steps.content:
Convert 484% to 4.84 and 0.880% to 0.00880 by dividing each by 100. This gives:
  • $A = 4.84B$ (since A is 484% of B)
  • $A = 0.00880C$ (since A is 0.880% of C)

steps.title: Equate the two expressions for A and solve for C
steps.content:
Since both expressions equal $A$:
$$4.84B = 0.00880C$$
Divide both sides by 0.00880:
$$C = \frac{4.84}{0.00880} \cdot B$$

steps.title: Calculate the ratio and convert to a percentage
steps.content:
Simplify $\frac{4.84}{0.00880}$:
$$\frac{4.84}{0.00880} = \frac{4840}{8.8} = \frac{48400}{88} = 550$$
So $C = 550B$, which means $C$ is 550 times $B$. Expressed as a percentage: $C = 55000\%$ of $B$. Therefore $p = 55000$.
